title: Peacocks of the Prince
alt: Two peacocks against a soft impressionist background, oil on canvas.

title: Where the Day Settles
alt: Wide horizontal sunset reflecting on still water with a flowering shore.

title: Light Through the Veil
alt: Sunbeams breaking through cloud onto the sea with tiny figures walking the shore.

title: Stones, Held
alt: A stone cairn beside a turquoise mountain lake under cloud-wrapped peaks.

title: The Island Holds Its Weather
alt: Storm clouds breaking over a small island in a still sea.

title: Valley After Rain
alt: Misty mountains framing a jewel-toned valley after rainfall.

title: The Mountain Sleeps
alt: A purple peak at dusk with reflective water beneath.

title: Moon Boat
alt: A woman in a small wooden boat with a moon-faced figure beside her, set in a sky-water dreamscape.
